name: usb.ids
description: USB IDs CLI and data artifacts package.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @usb-ids/sdk run build && pnpm run build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.build: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm run build:artifacts
scripts.fetch-usb-ids: pnpm --filter @usb-ids/sdk run build && tsx src/cli.ts fetch
scripts.dev:ui: pnpm --filter @usb-ids/sdk run build && tsx src/cli.ts ui
